title: Fullbright
description: This Mod will lighten up your Minecraft Experience by toggling Fullbright with a Keybinding
body:
# What is it?
This Mod can be used to toggle the brightness.

You can configure the keybinding in the Minecraft Keybinds settings.

**! If using Fabric you need to download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) as well !**



![Difference between fullbright on/off](https://i.postimg.cc/7ZtsQ2cp/difference-bright-dark.png)

![difference between fullbright on/off with fullbright text](https://i.postimg.cc/qq3YnXGs/difference-bright-dark-2.png)
